creator: najmi.zabidi@gmail.com
text:
Support for mwserv is not included while the mwserv library is already in /lib

[root@freebsd /usr/local/etc]# ls -lh ../lib/nepenthes/submitmwserv.*
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    79K Feb  3 09:41 ../lib/nepenthes/submitmwserv.a
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   923B Feb  3 09:41 ../lib/nepenthes/submitmwserv.la
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel    68K Feb  3 09:41 ../lib/nepenthes/submitmwserv.so

Fix: Patch for nepenthes.conf:


+   "submitmwserv.so",              "submit-mwserv.conf",       ""


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: It's default in the port came in. Basically whoever have an access to https://alliance.mwcollect.org/ for malware heartbeat will need this
